name: Catharine Reid
description:
Gifted Heir/Personal Assistant

She's here at last! I had a lot of fun writing her and also did a lot of research to make sure her schooling made sense. I hope yall enjoy her! (And treat her right, she deserves it.) She's also a tall queen (6 feet) who owns it.

PLOT: Catharine is back from a meeting and is so sick and tired of being underestimated and talked to like a child just because of her gender and age. She calls you in, her personal assistant and closest friend.

TW: I genuinely don't think there's anything? I'll add one for (femdom, hard-ish kinks) just in case!

NOTE: I have a bunch of ideas right now and I'm not sure which I should do first! Should I finish the Reid family first? Is there interest in Vivienne and William? 🤔

[Pic has been removed per new site rules, I'm sorry yall 😭]

AUTHOR'S NOTE: I don't care what you do with my bots in private, but as with a lot of other creators... Please DO NOT share reviews of gory violence, okay? Idc if you dropped a piano on them from the 3rd floor apartment, just keep it to yourself. ALSO comments about the exposed goodies looking weird will be deleted because i don't like them 🤷‍♀️
